flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Purdue University Northwest fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (6.4k → 5.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Purdue University Northwest fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Purdue University Northwest rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 (20.7% → 25.7%).
